sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 35:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 35:1
items.html: The impact of the root on a degree is called Keter [crown], from the word Machtir [crowning], meaning encircling. Because it is more refined than the entire degree, it encircles the entire Partzuf above it.
